text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, May 28. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Sleep quality is so important. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Planning for future education costs. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. I can run some projections for you. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need scheduling portal immediately. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Understood. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: School projects are fun. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Good focus area. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Went for a run around the neighborhood. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: I've logged your vitals. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has secure messaging. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Here is what I recommend. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping secure messaging in the MVP. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 4th grade level now. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. School projects are fun. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need billing integration immediately. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That is a common bottleneck. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Made good progress on my work tasks today. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
